docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,327.43 FILED BY CONNELLY, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLAND, COLLEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-21-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-01-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-04-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK WAS REPRESENTED BY MARY ANN MUSETTI--REGIONAL SERVICES ADVISOR. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO FEB-11-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE IS GOING TO AMEND HIS CLAIM TO ADD ANOTHER PARTY. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE AMENDED CLAIM ON THE DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,327.43 FILED BY CONNELLY, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-18-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK WAS REPRESENTED BY ANA GUTIERREZ--OPERATIONAL RISK CONSULTANT/VICE PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGESS REPORT OF 5/18/15. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK WAS REPRESENTED BY ANA GUTIERREZ--REGIONAL SERVICES ADVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF JOSEPH CONNELLY RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNELLY, JOSEPH
HOLLAND, COLLEEN IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO APR-01-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COLLEEN HOLLAND WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
